a.xlink:title: Print the string to player's chat.
Print the string to chat of all players of the specified team.
Called when a client spawns in the server.
message "": do not say, just test flood control return value: 1 = accept 0 = reject -1 = fake accept ...
Prints the scores to the console of a player.
Print the string to player's chat if the server cvar "developer" is not 0.
Print the string to chat of all players of the specified team if the server cvar "developer" is not 0...
